title: Paepalanthus microphyllus
taxonomy: Paepalanthus microphyllus belongs to the family Eriocaulaceae, which is a group of flowering plants commonly known as pipeworts. The genus Paepalanthus is a part of this family, and it consists of various species of plants found in different parts of the world. Paepalanthus microphyllus is a specific species within the genus Paepalanthus, known for its unique characteristics and features. It is a type of herbaceous plant, typically growing in wetland environments. The classification of Paepalanthus microphyllus is further supported by its anatomical and morphological features, which are typical of plants in the Eriocaulaceae family.
